# Gold Set Manifest Notes

This fixture directory freezes the first-pass silent-video gold set used by the
roadmap. The actual media may live in external storage later, but the filenames,
clip IDs, and human expectations here are the frozen source of truth for stage
planning and contract tests.

The set intentionally covers:
- single visible source action
- repeated actor/source across cuts
- crowd ambiguity
- vehicle motion
- environment/ambience-heavy scene
- ambiguous routing preference case
